default: Tip: Keep moving after each strike to avoid stamina drain spikes.
Tip: Target lock helps in duels, free aim helps in crowds.
Tip: Night is darker by design - carry light or move slower.
startup: Tip: Q blocks and triggers ultimate reaction, F is world interaction.
Tip: Light attacks adapt to context; forward pressure can turn into thrust.
Tip: Open the Codex to track characters, factions, events, and locations.
sharuan: Tip: From the hill roads, visibility is higher but you are easier to spot.
Tip: Forest near the river gives stealth cover but noisy footing.
Tip: Port district has denser NPC activity and heavier audio layering.
opening_memory: Tip: Opening memory sets the emotional baseline for Sherward.
Tip: Tutorial banners start right after the memory cutscene.
travel: Tip: Region bundles are mounted before world rebuild to reduce hitching.
Tip: Contextual loading keeps startup fast while preserving rich scenes.
